a_req: The developer shall design and develop high-risk AI systems to achieve an appropriate level of accuracy.

a_req: The deployer shall draw up a single set of technical documentation.
b_req: The deployer shall ensure the technical documentation contains all the information set out in paragraph 1 and the information required under those legal acts.

a_req: Provider must only process special categories of personal data for bias detection and correction when that bias detection and correction cannot be effectively fulfilled by processing other data, including synthetic or anonymised data.
b_req: Provider must apply technical limitations on the re-use of the special categories of personal data and implement state-of-the-art security and privacy-preserving measures, including pseudonymisation.

a_req: provider shall provide the high-risk AI system to the deployer in such a way that natural persons to whom human oversight is assigned are enabled to properly understand the relevant capacities and limitations of the high-risk AI system and be able to duly monitor its operation, including detecting and addressing anomalies, dysfunctions and unexpected performance.
b_req: provider shall provide the high-risk AI system to the deployer in such a way that natural persons to whom human oversight is assigned are enabled to remain aware of the possible tendency to automatically rely or over-rely on the output produced by the high-risk AI system.

a_req: Provider must only process special categories of personal data for bias detection and correction when that bias detection and correction cannot be effectively fulfilled by processing other data, including synthetic or anonymised data.
b_req: Provider must ensure the special categories of personal data are not transmitted, transferred, or otherwise accessed by other parties.

a_req: Provider must only process special categories of personal data for bias detection and correction when that bias detection and correction cannot be effectively fulfilled by processing other data, including synthetic or anonymised data.
b_req: Provider must delete the special categories of personal data once the bias has been corrected or the personal data has reached the end of its retention period, whichever occurs first.

a_req: Provider must only process special categories of personal data for bias detection and correction when that bias detection and correction cannot be effectively fulfilled by processing other data, including synthetic or anonymised data.
b_req: Provider must ensure the special categories of personal data are secured and protected with suitable safeguards, including strict controls and documentation of access, and that only authorised persons with appropriate confidentiality obligations have access.

a_req: Provider must only process special categories of personal data for bias detection and correction when that bias detection and correction cannot be effectively fulfilled by processing other data, including synthetic or anonymised data.
b_req: Provider must ensure that records of processing activities include the reasons why the processing of special categories of personal data was strictly necessary to detect and correct biases and why that objective could not be achieved by processing other data.

a_req: Provide in the instructions for use the intended purpose of the high-risk AI system.
b_req: Provide in the instructions for use any known or foreseeable circumstance related to the use of the high-risk AI system in accordance with its intended purpose or under conditions of reasonably foreseeable misuse which may lead to risks to health.

a_req: Provide in the instructions for use the characteristics, capabilities and limitations of performance of the high-risk AI system.
b_req: Provide in the instructions for use the intended purpose of the high-risk AI system.

a_req: The developer shall ensure that the training, validation and testing datasets are sufficiently representative, including, where applicable, as regards the persons or groups of persons in relation to whom the high-risk AI system is intended to be used.
b_req: The developer shall ensure that the training, validation and testing datasets have appropriate statistical properties.
